sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SMTH Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:SMTH
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed overview of the ALPS/SMITH Core Plus Bond ETF (SMTH), including its price performance, key statistics like Assets Under Management (AUM) and expense ratio, and investment strategy. SMTH aims for high current income and capital appreciation through a diversified portfolio of global bonds, using an active management style. It also covers technical analysis, seasonal trends, and frequently asked questions about ETFs.

feed.title: Refiner Valero Energy beats estimates for fourth-quarter profit
feed.summary: U.S. refiner Valero Energy (VLO.N) exceeded Wall Street's fourth-quarter profit expectations due to stronger refining margins and increased throughput volumes. The company's shares rose 1.6% before the bell. Valero reported a refining margin of $13.61 per barrel and a throughput volume of 3.1 million bpd, with analysts expecting a further boost from a recovery in Venezuelan crude imports.

feed.title: Caterpillar reports higher quarterly profit, revenue on AI-fueled power equipment demand
feed.summary: Caterpillar reported increased fourth-quarter revenue and profit, driven by strong demand for its power-generation equipment, particularly for data centers. The company saw its adjusted profit rise to $5.16 per share and revenue climb to $19.1 billion, with AI adoption fueling the need for its backup power generators. Caterpillar, a key indicator of the industrial economy, also benefited from price increases on industrial equipment, helping to offset softness in its construction segment.

feed.title: A$63.86 close 29 Jan 2026: AMC.AX Amcor plc ASX earnings due 03 Feb, watch margins
feed.summary: Amcor plc (AMC.AX) closed at A$63.86 on January 29, 2026, ahead of its earnings report on February 3, 2026. Investors are advised to watch margin trends, cash flow, and dividend yield, as these will likely drive the stock's next movement. Meyka AI projects a 12-month central price target of A$74.00, suggesting a 15.88% upside, but cautions about the high payout ratio and significant debt.

feed.title: Is Delta Air Lines, Inc.'s (NYSE:DAL) Latest Stock Performance A Reflection Of Its Financial Health?
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) has seen its stock increase by 15% over the past three months, prompting an investigation into its financial health, particularly its Return on Equity (ROE). The company exhibits a strong ROE of 24%, significantly higher than the industry average of 9.5%, contributing to its exceptional net income growth of 69% over the last five years. Despite a projected future decline in ROE to 19% due to an expected increase in payout ratio, Delta Air Lines' high profit retention and reinvestment suggest a positive financial outlook, though analysts anticipate future earnings to shrink.

feed.title: J. Safra Sarasin Holding AG Cuts Stake in The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX
feed.summary: J. Safra Sarasin Holding AG significantly reduced its stake in The TJX Companies, Inc. by 76.1% during the third quarter, selling 32,529 shares. Despite this, other institutional investors like Norges Bank and Laurel Wealth Advisors LLC increased their holdings in TJX Companies, with 91.09% of the stock owned by hedge funds and institutions. The TJX Companies recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.425.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Announces New ‘Discovery’ Class of Newbuilds
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has announced a new "Discovery Class" of newbuilds through agreements with Chantiers de l’Atlantique. The agreements include two firm ship orders, with the first ship debuting in 2029 and the second in 2032, plus options for four additional vessels. This partnership aims to leverage new technology and innovative design to reshape the future of cruise vacations.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group Reports 2025 Earnings
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has reported strong 2025 earnings, exceeding guidance, with an Adjusted EPS of $15.64. The company anticipates continued growth in 2026, driven by robust demand and strategic investments, expecting Adjusted EPS between $17.70 and $18.10. Furthermore, Royal Caribbean announced significant expansion plans, including new Discovery Class ships for Royal Caribbean and a substantial increase in Celebrity River Cruises' fleet.

feed.title: A Look At Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Valuation As Earnings And Platform Consolidation Expectations Build
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) stock is drawing investor attention ahead of its earnings report, with analysts focusing on its role in cybersecurity platform consolidation. Trading at US$183.74, the company is considered undervalued by one model and analyst target, suggesting a potential opportunity. However, its high P/E ratio compared to peers and the industry presents a valuation risk if growth expectations aren't met or if the CyberArk integration doesn't yield implied revenue and margin growth.

feed.title: Evaluating Crane NXT (CXT) After Guidance Raise On Strong Security And Authentication Third Quarter Results
feed.summary: Crane NXT (CXT) recently raised its full-year sales guidance after strong third-quarter results, driven by its Security and Authentication Technologies segment. Despite some macroeconomic pressures affecting Crane Payment Innovations, the company's valuation narrative suggests it is 34.3% undervalued at $76.33, compared to its last close of $50.14. This positive outlook is largely based on recurring authentication demand, rising profitability, and potential operating synergies from acquisitions.

feed.title: Bread Financial to pay March 16 cash dividends to shareholders
feed.summary: Bread Financial Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BFH) has announced its Board of Directors declared quarterly cash dividends for the first quarter of 2026 for both its preferred and common stock. A dividend of $26.35 per share ($0.65875 per depositary share) was declared for the 8.625% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series A, and $0.23 per share for common stock. Both dividends are payable on March 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on February 27, 2026.

feed.title: International Paper explores breakup, shares jump
feed.summary: International Paper Company is reportedly exploring a potential breakup of its business, causing its shares to surge by 11% in premarket trading. The specific details of the breakup, including which segments might be impacted, have not yet been disclosed. The company, a major global producer of fiber-based packaging and pulp, has not released an official statement regarding these reports.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher beats quarterly results estimates on demand for tools from pharma clients
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific exceeded Wall Street's expectations for fourth-quarter profit and revenue, driven by robust demand for its tools and services from pharmaceutical clients in drug development. This performance reflects improving conditions in the pharmaceutical market, which is helping life sciences firms counteract ongoing weakness in academic research funding. Rival company Danaher also reported better-than-expected results for the same quarter.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean confirms long-rumored new cruise ship plans
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has officially announced plans for a new class of cruise ships called the Discovery Class, with the first vessel expected to debut in 2029. These ships are anticipated to be smaller than the current Icon or Oasis Class, designed for "far flung" and "exotic" itineraries, and capable of navigating the Panama Canal. This announcement, along with previously confirmed ship orders, signals a significant expansion for Royal Caribbean in the coming decade.

feed.title: Beam Global Extends San Diego Headquarters Lease Agreement
feed.summary: Beam Global has extended its San Diego headquarters lease agreement at 5660 Eastgate Drive until September 30, 2026, with a monthly payment of $71,480. While other lease terms remain, the landlord gained the right to terminate the agreement with 90 days' notice, introducing some uncertainty for Beam Global's future occupancy. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, assesses BEEM as Neutral, citing poor financial performance and technical pressures, despite initiatives for cost improvement and expansion.

feed.title: Valero Energy earnings beat by $0.71, revenue topped estimates
feed.summary: Valero Energy (NYSE: VLO) reported stronger-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings and revenue. The company's EPS of $3.82 surpassed analyst estimates of $3.11, and revenue of $30.37 billion exceeded the consensus of $29.03 billion. Valero's stock has shown significant growth over the past year, and its financial health is rated as "good performance" by InvestingPro.

feed.title: American Rebel Announces Reverse Stock Split and Share Exchanges
feed.summary: American Rebel Holdings (AREB) has converted over $2.24 million in debt into approximately 7.0 million common shares with Streeterville Capital in January 2026. The company will execute a 1-for-20 reverse stock split on February 2, 2026, aiming to increase its share price, reduce outstanding shares, and maintain Nasdaq listing compliance, with provisions to protect small shareholders. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates AREB as “Underperform” due to weak financial performance, negative profitability, high leverage, and bearish technical momentum.

feed.title: Caterpillar Reports Fourth-Quarter And Full-Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) announced strong fourth-quarter and full-year results for 2025, achieving record full-year sales and revenues of $67.6 billion. The company reported a fourth-quarter profit per share of $5.12 and an adjusted profit per share of $5.16, contributing to an adjusted full-year profit of $19.06 per share. Caterpillar also highlighted robust enterprise operating cash flow of $11.7 billion and deployed $7.9 billion for share repurchases and dividends in 2025.

feed.title: Dow launches major Transform to Outperform restructuring program
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) has initiated a "Transform to Outperform" program to streamline operations, reduce costs, and boost operating EBITDA by at least $2 billion. This restructuring includes cutting approximately 4,500 jobs and incurring one-time costs of $1.1-1.5 billion. The plan aims to improve competitiveness, enhance shareholder returns, and strengthen Dow's long-term resilience, with an analyst rating of Hold and a $30.00 price target.

feed.title: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS Has $2.38 Million Stake in Mettler-Toledo International, Inc. $MTD
feed.summary: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS reduced its stake in Mettler-Toledo International, Inc. by 28.3% in Q3, now holding 1,938 shares valued at approximately $2.38 million. Mettler-Toledo International reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $11.15 and revenue of $1.03 billion, and provided optimistic FY2025 guidance. Institutional investors own 95.07% of the stock, while analysts currently hold a "Hold" rating with an average target price of $1,441.67.

(NASDAQ:MKTX) by 82.6% in the third quarter, selling 37,372 shares to retain 7,874 shares valued at $1.372 million. MarketAxess reported Q3 earnings that beat analyst estimates but missed on revenue, trading with a market cap of $6.27 billion and a consensus "Hold" rating with a $201.64 price target.

feed.title: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS Sells 20,220 Shares of Xylem Inc. $XYL
feed.summary: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS significantly reduced its stake in Xylem Inc. by 56.6%, selling 20,220 shares and holding 15,483 shares valued at approximately $2.28 million. Additionally, Xylem director Victoria D. Harker sold 1,700 shares, decreasing her position by 9.15%. Despite these sales, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Xylem, with an average price target of $165.80.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial announced strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, with record earnings and significant growth in assets under management. The company reported a 16% increase in adjusted operating earnings per diluted share for Q4 and 14% for the full year, achieving all-time highs for revenue and EPS. Strategic initiatives focused on returning capital to shareholders and strong performance across its business segments contributed to these robust outcomes.

feed.title: Dow Inc.: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) reported a fourth-quarter loss of $1.54 billion, or $2.15 per share, though adjusted losses of 34 cents per share surpassed Wall Street estimates. The materials science company posted revenues of $9.46 billion, falling short of analysts' predictions. This financial data was generated by Automated Insights using Zacks Investment Research.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $1.60 per common share. The dividend is payable on February 27, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on February 9, 2026. This announcement follows the company's recent strong financial performance, including a 16 percent increase in fourth-quarter adjusted operating earnings per diluted share.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (TMO) reported strong fourth-quarter earnings, with net income totaling $1.96 billion, or $5.21 per share. Adjusted earnings of $6.57 per share surpassed Wall Street expectations, as did revenue of $12.22 billion. For the full year, the company achieved a profit of $6.7 billion on revenue of $44.56 billion.

feed.title: McKesson stock price target raised to $966 from $916 at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for McKesson (NYSE:MCK) to $966 from $916, maintaining an Overweight rating, citing strong organic growth and updated business disclosures. InvestingPro data suggests the stock is undervalued, with analysts' targets ranging from $760 to $1000 and McKesson trading at $826.62. The healthcare services company plans to divest its Med-Surg business in late 2027, and has a strong financial health score and a history of consistent dividend increases.

feed.title: Honeywell beats Q4 expectations as aerospace spin-off accelerates
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ: HON) exceeded Q4 analyst expectations for earnings and revenue, driven by strong performance in its aerospace and building automation segments. The company's orders grew 23%, and it announced an accelerated timeline for the spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace, now expected in Q3 2026. For fiscal 2026, Honeywell projects adjusted earnings per share between $10.35 and $10.65, with sales ranging from $38.8 billion to $39.8 billion.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial (NYSE: AMP) reported record fourth quarter and full year 2025 results, with adjusted operating earnings per diluted share increasing 16% and 14% respectively. The company achieved record assets under management, administration, and advisement of $1.7 trillion and increased its return of capital to shareholders to $1.1 billion in Q4 and $3.4 billion for the full year. Results were driven by strong client activity, asset growth, expense discipline, and robust performance across its Advice & Wealth Management and Asset Management segments.

feed.title: PulteGroup Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: PulteGroup, Inc. reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025. The company announced diluted earnings per share of $2.56 for the quarter, with net income totaling $502 million. Despite a decrease in home sale revenues compared to the prior year, net new orders increased by 4% to 6,428 homes, valued at $3.5 billion, and the company repurchased $300 million of common shares.

feed.title: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC Purchases 111,753 Shares of Conagra Brands $CAG
feed.summary: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) by 104% in Q3, acquiring an additional 111,753 shares. Other institutional investors like Norges Bank and Ameriprise Financial also adjusted their positions, bringing total institutional ownership to about 83.75%. Despite institutional interest, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Reduce" consensus rating with a target price of $18.71, while the stock currently trades around $17.68 and offers an annualized dividend yield of approximately 7.9%.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) Surpasses Q4 2025 Expectations
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) reported strong financial results for Q4 2025, beating revenue and EPS expectations with $12.21 billion in revenue and adjusted EPS of $6.57. The company's success was attributed to strategic initiatives, innovative product launches, and key acquisitions. Thermo Fisher anticipates continued growth in 2026, driven by its focus on innovation, strategic partnerships, and expanding capabilities in the scientific and healthcare sectors.

feed.title: Lbp Am Sa Sells 69,241 Shares of The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX
feed.summary: Lbp Am Sa reduced its stake in The TJX Companies by 90.7% in the third quarter, selling 69,241 shares and retaining 7,068 shares valued at $1.022 million. Concurrently, CEO Ernie Herrman and other insiders sold a total of 54,863 shares worth approximately $8.23 million. TJX Companies reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations with $1.28 EPS on $15.12 billion revenue, issued positive Q4 and FY 2026 guidance, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.425.

feed.title: TAL Education soars 9.5% after strong earnings beat By Investing.com
feed.summary: TAL Education Group (NYSE:TAL) reported strong third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, with adjusted earnings per share significantly beating analyst expectations at $0.25 versus $0.07. Despite a slight revenue miss, the company saw substantial year-over-year revenue growth of 27% to $770.2 million and a notable improvement in profitability. This positive performance led to a 9.5% jump in the company's shares in pre-market trading.

feed.title: This Cult-Favorite Menu Item Will Make a Limited-Time Return This February
feed.summary: Chipotle is bringing back its popular Chicken al Pastor menu item for a limited time, starting February 10, following high customer demand on social media. The dish, first launched in 2023, will be available in the U.S., Canada, the UK, France, and Germany, with early access for Chipotle Rewards members. To promote its return, Chipotle will also offer a $0 delivery fee on Chicken al Pastor orders placed through its app and website from February 14 to February 28.

feed.title: Retirement Systems of Alabama Lowers Stake in Electronic Arts Inc. $EA
feed.summary: Retirement Systems of Alabama significantly reduced its stake in Electronic Arts (NASDAQ:EA) by 91.8% in the third quarter of 2025, selling over 538,000 shares. This move comes as Electronic Arts reported Q3 earnings that missed analysts' estimates, with both EPS and revenue falling short of expectations and revenue declining year-over-year. Despite the stock trading near its 1-year high, analysts currently have a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target below the current trading price.

feed.title: Dow to Cut About 4,500 Jobs, Using AI to Boost Operations
feed.summary: Dow Inc. announced plans to cut approximately 4,500 jobs and utilize AI and automation to streamline operations. This strategic move is projected to deliver at least a $2 billion increase in near-term operating earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization, with a target of $500 million for the current year. The job cuts are part of a broader effort to simplify company processes and boost efficiency.

feed.title: 138,940 Shares in Fortinet, Inc. $FTNT Bought by Retirement Systems of Alabama
feed.summary: The Retirement Systems of Alabama acquired 138,940 shares of Fortinet, Inc. (NASDAQ:FTNT) during the third quarter, a new position valued at approximately $11.68 million. This comes as Fortinet reported strong earnings, exceeding analyst expectations with $0.74 EPS and $1.72 billion in revenue, and provided optimistic FY2025 guidance. Despite insider stock sales by CEO Ken Xie and VP Michael Xie, institutional investors collectively own 83.71% of the company, and analysts generally maintain a "Hold" rating with an average target price of $90.04.

feed.title: ROYAL CARIBBEAN GROUP EXPANDS VACATION PORTFOLIO WITH NEW DISCOVERY CLASS TO BE BUILT AT THE CHANTIERS DE L'ATLANTIQUE SHIPYARD IN FRANCE
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has announced agreements with Chantiers de l'Atlantique for the construction of its new Discovery Class ships, with the first debut anticipated in 2029 and a second in 2032. This partnership continues a long-standing collaboration dating back to 1985 and aims to redefine the vacation experience through innovative design and technology. The new class will offer extraordinary experiences and builds on Royal Caribbean Group's commitment to expanding its global vacation offerings across ocean, river, and land.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean’s next cruise era: new Discovery Class ships set for 2029
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has ordered two new "Discovery Class" ships from Chantiers de l'Atlantique, with options for four more. The first ship is expected to debut in 2029 and the second in 2032, marking a significant expansion of Royal Caribbean's vacation portfolio. This partnership extends a long-standing relationship between the cruise line and the French shipyard.

feed.title: Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. $CMG Shares Sold by Retirement Systems of Alabama
feed.summary: Retirement Systems of Alabama significantly reduced its stake in Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) by 73.5% in Q3, selling 795,071 shares, but still holds 286,036 shares. Despite this sell-off, other institutional investors have increased their positions, with institutional ownership now at 91.30%. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for CMG, with a consensus price target of $50.23, while the stock currently trades near $39.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial Inc: Hidden-Player Stock That Might Be Sneakier Than Your Favorite FinTok Guru
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial Inc (AMP) is presented as a "hidden-player" stock that quietly performs while other investors chase meme stocks. The article evaluates AMP as an old-school wealth and financial planning brand, highlighting its stable business model based on recurring revenue from financial advice, wealth management, and insurance. It suggests that Ameriprise, while not flashy or "viral", offers a solid, long-term investment opportunity for those seeking stability and dividend-paying potential over speculative growth.

feed.title: Honeywell Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Results
feed.summary: Honeywell has released strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, with sales increasing by 6% and 8% respectively, and adjusted EPS up 17% and 12%. The company expects continued growth in 2026, anticipating sales between $38.8 billion and $39.8 billion and adjusted EPS of $10.35 to $10.65. Honeywell also announced that the spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace is now expected in the third quarter of 2026.

feed.title: Mutual of America Capital Management LLC Sells 8,213 Shares of D.R. Horton, Inc. $DHI
feed.summary: Mutual of America Capital Management LLC has reduced its stake in D.R. Horton, Inc. (NYSE:DHI) by 19.8%, selling 8,213 shares and now owning 33,346 shares valued at $5.65 million. This follows D.R. Horton exceeding its latest quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, reporting $2.03 EPS and $6.89 billion in revenue despite a 9.5% year-over-year decline in revenue. The company also announced a $0.45 quarterly dividend, and analysts currently have a "Hold" consensus rating with a target price of $160.50.

feed.title: Dow Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Results
feed.summary: Dow Inc. has released its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025, reporting a challenging quarter with a 9% decrease in net sales to $9.5 billion and a GAAP net loss of $1.5 billion. The company highlighted ongoing cost reduction efforts and the "Transform to Outperform" initiative, aiming to simplify its operating model and generate $2 billion in additional near-term earnings. Dow plans to focus on cost savings, complexity reduction, and streamlining processes to navigate the industry downturn and enhance efficiency.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025, with increased revenue and EPS. The company advanced its growth strategies through innovative product launches, strategic acquisitions, and collaborations, and returned $3.6 billion to shareholders. CEO Marc N. Casper expressed confidence in the company's operational performance and future outlook.

feed.title: Prediction: 2026 Will Be the Year of PayPal
feed.summary: Despite a recent stock decline, PayPal is positioned for a strong rebound in 2026 due to its undervalued valuation and strategic partnership with OpenAI. The company continues to show revenue and earnings growth, alongside aggressive stock buybacks, indicating a potential for significant returns. The integration of PayPal's payment technology and merchant network with ChatGPT's commerce capabilities could serve as a major catalyst for investor recognition and stock appreciation.

feed.title: American Rebel Holdings Signs Multiple Exchange Agreements With Streeterville Capital
feed.summary: American Rebel Holdings (AREB) has signed multiple debt-for-equity exchange agreements with Streeterville Capital. These agreements aim to reduce the company’s outstanding secured note and improve its balance sheet. Through these exchanges, American Rebel Holdings converted debt into common shares, thereby reducing its liabilities and enhancing financial flexibility.

feed.title: META Platforms (NASDAQ:META) Passes Key Peter Lynch Investment Filters
feed.summary: META Platforms (NASDAQ:META) has successfully passed key investment filters derived from Peter Lynch's investment philosophy, known as Growth at a Reasonable Price (GARP). The company demonstrates strong profit expansion, a sensible PEG ratio of 0.91, high return on equity, and robust financial strength with a low debt-to-equity ratio. These factors, combined with Meta's widely used "Family of Apps," suggest it aligns well with Lynch's criteria for a sound investment.

feed.title: Retirement Systems of Alabama Acquires New Holdings in AeroVironment, Inc. $AVAV
feed.summary: Retirement Systems of Alabama has acquired a new position in AeroVironment, Inc. (NASDAQ:AVAV), purchasing 38,465 shares valued at approximately $12.11 million in Q3, making institutional investors own about 86.38% of the company's stock. Despite missing quarterly EPS estimates, the aerospace company saw a 150.7% YoY revenue increase and received a "Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $378. Recent positive developments include a $75 million U.S. Air Force task order and management presenting at an Aerospace & Defense conference, while insider selling accounted for a small percentage of company ownership.
